name: option-list
title: Option List
author: mcpcn
description: Tag-style option selector with single or multiple selection modes.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with single and multiple selection modes
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed id from Option interface. Use array index for selection tracking.
changelog.2.0.1: Moved demo data to separate file for cleaner component code
changelog.2.1.0: Moved to selection category for better organization
changelog.2.1.1: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.2.1.2: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.2.1.3: Fixed circular dependency by adding types.ts and demo/data.ts to registry
changelog.3.0.0: BREAKING: Replaced onSelectOption and onSelectOptions with single onSubmit action. Added confirm button.
changelog.3.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.3.0.2: Fixed stale controlled state and improved list item keys
changelog.3.0.3: Fixed infinite re-render loop when control prop is not provided
changelog.3.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
